markdown_content:
## Executive Summary

Comprehensive project summary covering three distinct deliverables: animated GIF creation using Veo 3.1 after API limitations, English-Korean PDF translation with format preservation, and development of a structured memory system for the Ludivine project using Notion. The session documents technical processes, challenges with model availability and API quotas, and establishes ongoing work streams.


## Context & Intent

Review and synthesize progress across multiple Media & Crea project workstreams, documenting completed deliverables and establishing continuation framework


## What Was Done

Analyzed three project streams: GIF generation (transparent jumping monkey), PDF translation workflow, and Ludivine memory system architecture with Notion integration


## Outputs Produced

- [documentation] Project synthesis document — Structured overview of three project streams with technical details and challenges
- [deliverable] Animated GIF — 1.7MB transparent jumping monkey GIF, 512x288 resolution
- [system] Ludivine memory system — Notion-based memory hub with project context and historical information

## Key Decisions & Validations

- Switch from Gemini 2.5 Flash to Veo 3.1 for GIF generation
- Establish Notion as primary memory system platform for Ludivine project
- Document API quota management as ongoing operational concern

## Lessons Learned

Worked well:

- Veo 3.1 video-to-GIF conversion workflow
- Notion integration for memory systems
- Structured project documentation approach
Failed / suboptimal:

- Initial model selection without API quota verification
- File upload coordination delays
- Reactive rather than proactive model contingency planning
Discoveries:

- API quota exhaustion as recurring constraint
- Need for model selection contingency planning
- File reception workflow optimization opportunities

## Challenges & Blockers

- API quota limitations on preferred models
- Model availability fluctuations
- File upload coordination delays
- Information synchronization complexity for living memory systems

## Open Questions

- How to optimize model selection process for reliability?
- What additional tools could enhance translation accuracy?
- How to improve memory system usability and flexibility?

## Next Steps

- Monitor API usage patterns
- Verify and refine PDF translations
- Expand Ludivine Notion page with additional research inputs
- Establish model contingency protocols
